title: How to Mirror Updates to Multiple Boards (Without Going Crazy)

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Folks,

I know a lot of you are looking to mirror the same update from one item to another, and it’s been a huge hassle.

Luckily - we have a simple solution for it. No need to setup complex workflows or automations.

Try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

Centralize your designs (3)1920×960 194 KB

With Mirror Item, you can -

  • Keep Updates synced across unlimited boards
  • New Updates sync automatically with replies + edits
  • Subitem updates are fully supported with replies + edits

The app also allows you to mirror the same item to multiple boards with full context, so you don’t need to use complex mirror columns/connect boards and clutter your boards.

Keep things simple and easy.

Try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app today! Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co for a free demo or in case you have any questions.

posts.author: agatha32 (Agatha)
posts.cookedHtml: That sounds super helpful! I’ve been struggling to keep updates consistent across multiple boards, so this could really simplify things. Thanks for sharing — I’ll definitely give the mirror Item app a try!
